WHO said residents and long-term visitors staying more than four weeks should receive a dose of bOPV or IPV between four weeks and twelve months before international travel. For urgent travel inside four weeks, WHO still recommends vaccinating at least by departure because it can still help.
[intuitive solution] This is a combinations problem: C(6,3) = 20.
[real-world solution] Let the child's age be c. Then the parent is c + 20. In 2 years: c + 20 + 2 = 2(c + 2). Solving gives c = 18.

That statement is incorrect. Climate is long-term pattern of weather in a region. Climate averages weather over long time periods. A good example is a desert climate is dry over many years.

That statement is incorrect. Speed is distance traveled per unit time. Speed describes how fast, while acceleration describes change in speed or direction. A good example is 60 kilometers per hour.

WHO's March 4, 2026 statement says the international spread of poliovirus still constitutes a Public Health Emergency of International Concern, so the temporary recommendations were extended for another three months. The committee also said the event does not constitute a pandemic emergency.

You can picture base as a simple pattern in everyday life: a substance that can accept hydrogen ions or release hydroxide ions in solution. For example, baking soda solution. It is not the same as acid; bases often feel slippery and can neutralize acids.

You can picture frequency as a simple pattern in everyday life: how many wave cycles pass a point each second. For example, a sound tone with higher pitch has higher frequency. It is not the same as wavelength; frequency counts cycles per second and wavelength measures distance between crests.

You can picture wave as a simple pattern in everyday life: a disturbance that transfers energy. For example, light or sound waves. It is not the same as particle; a wave transfers energy through oscillation.

8.text: As of February 13, 2026, AP reported that ceasefire overseers said repeated violations were undermining plans for transitional administration and reconstruction sequencing in Gaza. Governance transfer and reconstruction depend on tighter compliance and enforceable security guarantees. Source: AP (https://apnews.com/article/7cd49e6b515f511a1e8eac1beaa4d598).

Short brief (February 4, 2026): AP reported multiple casualties, including children, during strikes that occurred despite an existing truce framework and ongoing disputes over compliance. Practical takeaway: Operational violence continues to erode trust in ceasefire mechanisms and prolong humanitarian strain. Source: AP (https://apnews.com/article/a3726ab659321430bf3ca73cae50936e).

As of February 15, 2026, AP reported fires and infrastructure damage at the Russian port area after a Ukrainian drone strike, while Russian attacks also disrupted utilities in Ukraine. The escalation happened just before renewed US-brokered peace discussions. Energy and logistics targets remain central to pressure tactics even during diplomatic windows. Source: AP (https://apnews.com/article/90e731743c18d6d82c343314e07b1630).

As of February 19, 2026, AP reported that nine countries pledged about $7 billion for Gaza relief and five countries signaled troop participation in a stabilization force. The same reports noted that reconstruction needs were estimated much higher and key implementation details remained unresolved. Funding and security commitments expanded, but ceasefire durability and governance design still determine execution risk. Source: AP (https://apnews.com/article/22e587df67e27cd1e1d96e446cb88378).

As of February 19, 2026, A UN-backed mission said the RSF campaign targeted non-Arab communities, especially Zaghawa and Fur groups, with mass killings, sexual violence, and abductions. AP reported over 6,000 deaths in three days during the late-October assault and said investigators found indicators consistent with genocide. The finding increases pressure for accountability mechanisms, sanctions enforcement, and humanitarian access in Darfur. Source: AP (https://apnews.com/article/85b79539f9e4b18e25dd6ef82d5b53ee).

As of February 5, 2026, AP cited IPC analysis indicating worsening acute malnutrition in additional Darfur areas while fighting and attacks on medical facilities continued. Conflict and food-system disruption are reinforcing a high-probability humanitarian deterioration scenario. Source: AP (https://apnews.com/article/9b16a0419f8d7cc67c7e95939a8a954d).

Student: What is food chain? Teacher: Food chain is a sequence showing how energy moves through organisms by eating and being eaten. Student: Can you give an example? Teacher: Sure—grass -> rabbit -> fox.

Water cycle is like a clue in a mystery: it points to what is happening in a system. For example, rain falling after cloud formation. It is not the same as rock cycle; the water cycle describes water movement while the rock cycle describes rock changes.
